conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales Trainer
Location: Ahmedabad
Experience: 5+ years
Type: Full Time

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India.

## Role Overview
The Sales Trainer role is for a seasoned sales professional with a passion for training and development. This role will ensure sales teams are equipped to pitch and sell our products, driving sales performance and growth.

## Key Responsibilities
• Design and deliver training programs for sales teams on company information, pitches, and products.
• Develop gamification strategies to enhance training engagement and pitch retention.
• Evaluate employee performance and provide feedback for continuous improvement.
• Train sales teams and devise strategies for pitch retention.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align training programs with business objectives.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Sales training and development
• Gamification and interactive learning
• Sales expertise and knowledge of sales principles
• Communication and interpersonal skills

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Experience with training software and technologies

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
A results-driven and collaborative individual with a passion for training and development, strong interpersonal skills, and the ability to work with cross-functional teams.

## Success Metrics
• Within 30 days: comprehensive understanding of company products and sales strategies
• Within 90 days: delivered initial training sessions with measurable improvements
• Within 6 months: refined training program with significant and sustained sales performance improvements

## How to Apply
Submit your application through our website, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications.
